description: Shinhan Financial Group Co., Ltd. provides financial products and services in South Korea, Vietnam, and Japan. The company operates in six segments: Banking, Credit card, Securities, Insurance, Credit, and Others. It offers credit, lending and receiving deposits; credit cards, short-term and long-term card loan services, installment financing, and leases; securities trading, consignment trading, and underwriting; life and non-life insurance business; facility rental and new technology business financing; and real estate trust, investment advisory services, venture business investment, and othe
